name: golang-github-coreos-go-systemd-dev
title: golang-github-coreos-go-systemd-dev
summary: Go client bindings for systemd socket activation, journal and D-Bus
description:
Go client bindings for systemd socket activation, journal and D-Bus
Package "go-systemd" is a library that implements native Go client bindings
for systemd in packages "activation", "journal", and "dbus".
.
This package contains the source.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-coreos-go-systemd-dev because Go client bindings for systemd socket activation, journal and D-Bus.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-coreos-go-systemd-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-coreos-go-systemd-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-coreos-go-systemd-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
